english_text: This is a small seaside town
The air here is so fresh
I wake up to the sound of waves
The neighborhood grandmas are so sweet
The sunset here is the most beautiful
Let's watch it from the beach
I come here when I need to think
I didn't expect to stay this long
I found my place in the world
I've liked you for a while
You make this town even more special
korean_text: 당신 덕분에 이 마을이 더 특별해요
romanization: dangsin deokbune i maeuri deo teukbyeolhae-yo

english_text: I want to stay here forever
Let's grow old in this village
Home is not a place it's people
Every day here is a blessing
This is where I'm meant to be
ChaChaCha is the rhythm of this town
